workflow.name: GitLab CE HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate GitLab CE HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare GitLab CE inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/gitlab_ce-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[gitlab_ce]
10.31.108.11 role=gitlab name=gitlab-ce-01
10.31.108.12 role=gitlab name=gitlab-ce-02
10.31.108.13 role=gitlab name=gitlab-ce-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install GitLab CE container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/gitlab_ce-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: gitlab_ce
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/gitlab_ce-inventory.ini /tmp/gitlab_ce-runtime.yml

data.label: Render GitLab CE cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/gitlab_ce-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: gitlab_ce
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/gitlab_ce
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/gitlab_ce/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            gitlab:
              image: gitlab/gitlab-ce:17.3.0-ce.0
              container_name: octastack-gitlab
              restart: unless-stopped
              environment:
                GITLAB_OMNIBUS_CONFIG: "external_url 'http://gitlab.example.internal'"
              ports:
                - "80:80"
                - "443:443"
                - "2222:22"
              volumes:
                - data:/var/opt/gitlab
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy GitLab CE cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/gitlab_ce-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/gitlab_ce/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/gitlab_ce/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/gitlab_ce/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/gitlab_ce-inventory.ini /tmp/gitlab_ce-deploy.yml

data.label: Document GitLab CE topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/gitlab_ce-topology.md <<'EOF'
# GitLab CE HA topology

Members:
- gitlab-ce-01: 10.31.108.11 (gitlab)
- gitlab-ce-02: 10.31.108.12 (gitlab)
- gitlab-ce-03: 10.31.108.13 (gitlab)

This example deploys one GitLab CE container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/gitlab_ce-topology.md

data.label: Validate GitLab CE cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/gitlab_ce-inventory.ini gitlab_ce -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
